title: rubus rectangulatus
intro: Rubus rectangulatus, also known as the Chinese Raspberry or Yang Li Shu, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to China and commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Rubus rectangulatus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and diabetes. Rubus rectangulatus is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
